feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom enhancement required on Project Control tile in PS module; need suitable BAdI suggestion.
entry.content: Custom enhancement is required on the Project Control tile in the PS (Project System) module. The requirement involves adding/modifying business logic at the tile or application level. However, the appropriate BAdI or enhancement spot for implementing this change is not identified yet. Guidance is needed to determine the correct BAdI or technical approach (such as OData service enhancement or backend exit) to achieve the desired customization.

entry.title: Unable to add PDF Form against company code US28 and Payment method T
entry.content: Hi Team, In FBZP tcode we have to assign custom payment advice FORM in PDF format while checking in payment method in company code field FORM for the payment medium shows with non-editable option i.e. "SAPscript" there is no option to change format

entry.title: Project Control Enterprise & Project Brief tile; need suitable BAdI suggestion.
entry.content: Custom enhancement is required on the Project Control tile in the PS (Project System) module. This requirement involves adding/modifying business logic at the tile or application level. However, the appropriate BAdI or enhancement spot to implement this change is not identified yet. Guidance is needed to determine the correct BAdI or technical approach (such as OData service enhancement or backend exit) to achieve the desired customization.

entry.title: What tends to create the most complexity in your SAP integrations today?
entry.content:
As you read in the caption, maybe Data, APIs, or process orchestration? Lately it feels like SAP integrations get complicated faster than expected. What starts simple ends up having a lot more moving parts.

In your experience, what’s usually the biggest source of that complexity?

entry.title: After moving to RISE with SAP, what changed the most in your operating model or delivery approach?
entry.content:
Moving to RISE with SAP is often framed as a technical shift, but in practice, it tends to change how teams actually work.

Things like ownership, decision-making, and even how delivery is structured don’t always stay the same. In some cases, processes become more standardized; in others, teams need to adapt in ways they didn’t fully expect.

If you’ve gone through that transition, what changed the most for you in your operating model or delivery approach?

entry.title: To get Services for Object icon for VD51/VD52.
entry.content:
In VA01/VA02 we get services for object icon, where we can assign the external document to the Sales order.

We need a similar functionality for VD51/VD52 for Customer Material Info record data.

We assigned the Parameter SD_SWU_ACTIVE as X under user profile. After this change we get only for Sales Order and not for CMIR.

Request you to refer to the enclosed attachment for more details.

entry.title: FAGLB03 Default Variant is not defaulting
entry.content:
User is running into an issue where their default layout for FAGLB03 is changing based on the last variant chosen when running FAGLL03.
User reports using a specific variant each day for a revenue process that is completed in T-code FAGLL03.
When user runs T-code FAGLB03, the last variant layout from t-code FAGLL03 comes over by default. We checked their default layout in FAGLB03, and it says that it is set to 1SAP, but it is not defaulting to that layout.
Please see attached testing document for examples of this occurring.

entry.title: 3012667 - Without the ILM Business Function being active in the system, BUPA_ILM_BF
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Good day!

Need your help in implementing the below note: 

3012667 - Business Function (BF) BUPA_ILM_BF cannot be activated without BF ILM being active in the system.

In our system, the BUPA_ILM_BF business function is activated; however, the ILM business function is not active. According to SAP Note 3012667, the system states that “Without the ILM Business Function being active in the system, BUPA_ILM_BF should not be activated.”

This note was identified in the Simplification Item List as part of the upgrade.

What would be the impact if ILM Business Function is not activated in the system.

Could you please help clarify whether the required activity needs to be performed in the upgraded system or in the existing (pre-upgrade) system?

If this needs to be performed in the pre-upgraded system, i would need your help in guiding us in the activation of it.

Regards,

entry.title: Change log for reservation under lineitem
entry.content:
IN ME22N Tcode(PO Change) We have Environment tab we found header changes and item changes.
Same, we need to implement in the MB22 Tcode. There is an environment tab, but there is no scope to view the header and item changes. so we need to incorporate the header and item changes regarding reservations.In report level also like MB25 , There is no scope to view the change log regarding reservation.In table level(RESB) we found header changes.So need to incorporate the change log regarding reservation.For example, in reservation we have 4 line items, the first lineitem ''X'' user deleted and the next line item ''Y' user changed the quantity here We need to view the changes like Which user changed the data. (Either X Or Y).

entry.title: FIORI app F2705 - how to add custom start conditions
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

Good day!

Can you please kindly help me how to create new options in the flag thar correspond to CL20N in APP F2705 in FIORI? 

 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: OAAQ highest physical year need to reduce from 2026 to 2025
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We posted document number 3000000011 using transaction AFABN in 2024, but the relevant period is now closed. Currently, we have identified an issue with a missing profit center in this document. To resolve this, we need to reverse the document and repost it with the correct profit center assignment.

Could you please suggest the correction?

entry.title: SAP report for Field status comparison between ECC and S4 Hana for vendor accounts
entry.content:
SAP report for Field status comparison between ECC and S4 Hana for vendor accounts.
ECC- Vendor 
S4 Hana- Vendor/BP

entry.title: API to S4 Tables to Azure
entry.content: Need guidance on how to configure a connection from Azure Cloud to SAP S4 tables for extraction of transactional data from ACDOCA

entry.title: S4 FBWE Download Path not clear / no documentation
entry.content:
Hello,

after upgrading to S4 HANA the download path in FDTA cannot be change in S4.

In ERP its not a problem at all.

Pls. see attachment

Regards

entry.title: mb5b and MB5w data miss match in TSP
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

WE are extracting the data using MB5B and MB5W with inputs as company code T101 to T501. 

but the close value of MB5B and total value of MB5w is not matching. 

Can you please guide what are the possiblity that these 2 standard report aren't matching

 

regards

entry.title: After deleting tiles catalog and group, and subsequently performing role synchronization in PFCG
entry.content:
We have removed the tile FS00 from the custom Fiori catalog  ZF_FI_D_FINANCIAL_MANAGER_TRV. After deleting the tile from the catalog (and associated group)

However, when we perform role synchronization in PFCG, we observe that multiple application names are proposed again for addition in the role, including applications related to the previously deleted tile. Along with these newly added application entries

We request clarification on whether this behavior is standard by design in SAP Fiori Launchpad and guidance on the correct

entry.title: Manage Batches Fiori APP F2462 not support for digital signature
entry.content: Manage Batches Fiori APP F2462 not support for digital signature , as same support to Change batch app.

entry.title: The line item violates the cutoff value of -12.40 in area 01 Message No. AA632
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Getting below error while settling WBS DR901-000002-11 in CJ88 

The line item violates the cut off value of -12.40 in area 01

Message No. AA632

PL. see the attachment and suggest the solution as our connection is already opened..

Regards,

Dr. Dharmveer Vishwakarma

Cell-9903327581

entry.title: SAP Readiness Check for Upgrade froto 2025m SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud to 2025
entry.content:
I am working on reviewing the ATC Custom Code Analysis from our Upgrade Readiness report and trying to understand what the items are in the $TMP package under the 'Prerequisites for the test' custom code topic.  Can you advise if these items were created during go-live?  This will be our 1st upgrade since go-live in 2024.  I have read through the documentation but still don't have good clarity to be able to identify the amount of effort that is needed to resolve these issues (or are they actual issues). 

Examples of objects - /GY/20180432121444016800

entry.title: Remove Objects in ATC scans
entry.content:
We want to exclude objects during normal ATC scans. Although a BAdI supports this, it works only during release. As a result, we face challenges when changing the CD status in CHARM, as this re‑initiates the ATC scan and reports messages for the skipped objects.

Example : BRF+ generated function module (Z*) but does not follow naming convention for program variables and signature.  So exemption needs tobe requested for them everytime.
